questions.question_text: What should you pay particular attention to here?
You have just passed the roadworks and must continue straight ahead. There is no traffic behind you. What do you do?
You are driving at 60 to 70 km/h and must continue straight ahead. The tractor ahead is moving slowly. There is no traffic behind you. What do you do?
You are driving at 50 km/h in a built-up area. What do you do?
You are driving at 60 to 70 km/h. What do you do?
How fast may you drive on this road up to the bend?
What should you pay particular attention to here?
You are driving at 50 km/h and must follow the road. What do you do?
What should you pay particular attention to a little further ahead?
You must continue straight ahead at the intersection. There is no traffic behind you. What do you do?
What should you pay particular attention to here?
You are driving at 40 km/h, the same speed as the car ahead. What do you do?
You are driving at about 50 km/h, the same speed as the car ahead. What do you do?
You are about to catch up with the car ahead. It is moving slowly at about 30 km/h. What do you do?
You have just flashed your headlights to overtake, and the car ahead suddenly moves to the left. What do you do?
You are approaching an intersection with several traffic lanes. Where should you position yourself if you want to continue straight ahead?
You are driving at about 40 km/h and must continue straight ahead at the intersection. What do you do?
You want to turn left here. What should you pay particular attention to?
You have been drinking beer and spirits with a friend, and both of you have had too much to drink. What do you do?
You are driving at about 50 km/h. What do you do?
What should you pay particular attention to here?
You are driving at 80 to 90 km/h, but the lorry is not giving you enough room to merge into the motorway. What do you do?
You have got out of the red car. Which rule applies here?

answers.1: I may leave the car here for 2-3 minutes.

questions.question_text: You have got out of the red car. Which rule applies here?

answers.1: I may leave the car here for 2-3 minutes.
answers.3: Stopping and parking are prohibited here.
